title: Kyoko strangling Asuka from the manga
display_title: Kyoko strangling Asuka from the manga
wikitext:
[]: Kyoko strangling Asuka; from the manga?             Quote Post by V » Sun Mar 02, 2008 9:16 pm http://www.tesuji.org/als_images/1165043563608.jpg I saw this linked to Is it actually from Sadamoto's manga or is it doujinshi?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Mar 02, 2008 11:10 pm Pretty sure that's Sadamoto's manga.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sun Mar 02, 2008 11:51 pm hmmm need to confirm; anyone know what volume Asuka gets mind-raped in?

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Mar 03, 2008 1:16 am 7 or 8, I'm leaning towards 8.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Mar 03, 2008 3:09 pm It IS from the Manga, think it was Volume 8. Little Asuka's thoughts: "Mama!!" Asuka in the present: "Noooo! Don't make me remember that!"

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Mar 03, 2008 3:56 pm I just checked my manga. Vol 9, Stage 60: "Doll". In my book it's page 96.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Mar 03, 2008 9:05 pm thank you kindly, for the translation Stardust and for the issue Ornette (i have to get around to thumbing through these next time I see 'em, my local anime club doesn't have 'em)
